results.title: Santa Barbara County Certifies Results of June Election
results.description: Santa Barbara County’s June 2 election results were certified Friday by outgoing Clerk-Recorder-Assessor and Registrar of Voters Joe Holland, who lost his re-election bid to Deputy Melinda Greene. Holland is [...] The post Santa Barbara County Certifies Results of June Election appeared first on Noozhawk .

results.title: 'They hugged my son to check if he had a knife': Mother of caste murder victim tells panel in TN
results.description: Thirteen years later, Vasantha testified before the Justice K N Basha Prevention of Honour Killing Commission, where families of victims renewed their demand for a separate law against honour killings.
